title: रुद्र गायत्री
devanagariText:
॥ श्री रुद्र गायत्री ॥

ॐ तत्पुरुषाय विद्महे महादेवाय धीमहि।
तन्नो रुद्रः प्रचोदयात्॥

ॐ अघोराय विद्महे घोरघोराय धीमहि।
तन्नो रुद्रः प्रचोदयात्॥

ॐ तत्पुरुषाय विद्महे शूलहस्ताय धीमहि।
तन्नो रुद्रः प्रचोदयात्॥

॥ इति श्री रुद्र गायत्री सम्पूर्णम् ॥
transliteration:
|| Shri Rudra Gayatri ||

Om Tatpurushaya Vidmahe Mahadevaya Dhimahi.
Tanno Rudrah Prachodayat.

Om Aghoraya Vidmahe Ghoraghoraya Dhimahi.
Tanno Rudrah Prachodayat.

Om Tatpurushaya Vidmahe Shulahastaya Dhimahi.
Tanno Rudrah Prachodayat.

|| Iti Shri Rudra Gayatri Sampoornam ||
hindiMeaning: हम तत्पुरुष (परम पुरुष) महादेव का ध्यान करते हैं, त्रिशूलधारी रुद्र देव हमारी बुद्धि को सन्मार्ग पर प्रेरित करें। हम अघोर स्वरूप, घोर से भी घोरतर रुद्र का ध्यान करते हैं, वे हमें प्रेरणा प्रदान करें। रुद्र गायत्री भगवान शिव के रुद्र रूप की उपासना का परम मन्त्र है जो भय और कष्टों का नाश करता है।
benefits: Invokes the fierce protective energy of Lord Rudra
Destroys fear, negative energies, and evil influences
Grants protection from untimely death and calamities
Purifies the mind and leads to spiritual enlightenment
description: Rudra Gayatri — रुद्र गायत्री — is a powerful Vedic meditation mantra offered to Lord Shiva. This sacred composition is sourced from Yajur Veda and continues to inspire devotees worldwide. Chanting this stotra with devotion is said to invoke the fierce protective energy of Lord Rudra as well as grant protection from untimely death and calamities. Additionally, it is known to purify the mind and leads to spiritual enlightenment. This prayer is traditionally recited on Monday (Somvar) and during Maha Shivaratri and Pradosh to invoke divine grace. With 3 verses and a reading time of about 2 minutes, this prayer is ideal for both daily worship and special occasions. On this page, you can read the complete Rudra Gayatri in Devanagari Sanskrit with English transliteration, Hindi meaning (arth), and free PDF download for offline recitation.
seoDescription: Rudra Gayatri Mantra in Sanskrit with Hindi meaning. Invoke Lord Rudra's blessings for protection, fearlessness, and spiritual strength.
